config.title: Kreator realizacji zamówienia - magazyn
config.script:
#include "50209" #include "50200"
#define CTRL_ZANIECHAJ 5 #define CTRL_RADIO_NAME 6 #define CTRL_REALIZUJ 7
function c##CTRL_ZANIECHAJ##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRL_ZANIECHAJ##_ongetdata=true if container().rule = 1 then if not container().mag is nothing then oCtrl.text = container().mag.strNazwa oCtrl.disable = false end if else oCtrl.disable = true oCtrl.text = "" end if end function
#if appvar_mode = KREATOR_REAL_ZAM_MODE_SIMPLE
function c##CTRL_REALIZUJ##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRL_REALIZUJ##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.disable = true if not container().mag is nothing then oCtrl.text = container().mag.strNazwa oCtrl.disable = true else oCtrl.text = "<kliknij z prawej>" end if
end function
#endif
#if appvar_mode = KREATOR_REAL_ZAM_MODE_ADVANCED
function c##CTRL_REALIZUJ##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRL_REALIZUJ##_ongetdata=true if container().rule = 2 then if not container().mag is nothing then oCtrl.text = container().mag.strNazwa oCtrl.disable = false end if else oCtrl.disable = true oCtrl.text = "" end if end function
#endif
function c##CTRL_REALIZUJ##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue):c##CTRL_REALIZUJ##_ondataentered=false c##CTRL_REALIZUJ##_ondataentered=true end function
function c##CTRL_RADIO_NAME##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRL_RADIO_NAME##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.value = container().rule end function
function c##CTRL_RADIO_NAME##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue):c##CTRL_RADIO_NAME##_ondataentered=true container().rule = oCtrl.value c##CTRL_RADIO_NAME##_ondataentered=true end function
function choose_mag(hli): choose_mag=true
dim choice : choice = fire_choice_list( TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,"","","eTyp=N5TYPMAG_PODSTAWOWY","","")
if choice <> 0 then set container().mag = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN, choice) container().rule = clng(hli.prop(APPVAR_WHAT_TO_CHOOSE)) end if
end function
function show_mag doc_.getmodule(60129).form_domodal TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN , container().mag.idobj , USAGE_VIEW end function
function is_empty() is_empty = true if container().rule = 1 and container().mag is nothing then exit function end if
if container().rule = 2 and container().mag is nothing then exit function end if
is_empty = false end function

page.body:
XFORMMWIZZARDBEGIN(80827)
#if appvar_mode = KREATOR_REAL_ZAM_MODE_ADVANCED
Reguła realizacji
Zaniechaj gdy czegoś braknie na magazynie
Realizuj tyle, ile jest na magazynie
Zawsze realizuj
#endif
#if appvar_mode = KREATOR_REAL_ZAM_MODE_SIMPLE
Magazyn wydania
QXE_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRL_REALIZUJ,20) QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5MAGAZYN,varFunctionHLI="choose_mag" appvar_what_to_choose=2,Wybór magazynu)
#endif
XFORMMWIZZARDEND
